picks.quote: I already know I'm taking Stephanie Han... I'm 98% sure Stephanie Han does exactly what she did in the first fight. And beats Holly Holm equally as convincing.
I have Azim on the money line at the moment... I'm 100% convinced Azim's going to be way too much on the money line.
Desley Robinson, I think these odds are great. I like her a lot against Mary Spencer... I think she's going to be too much.
Kiko Kettle is my dog of the week... I think that Kettle is going to jump out to an early lead. I think he's going to win rounds early.
Cason's 32 years old. He's never fought past the fifth round. This is his first 12 rounder. It's his biggest step up. I don't think he's live at all.
after watching tape, Fran Hennessy should win a points decision.
I think Shakur is going to make this easy. I think it's going to go belt to ass 8 to 4... Shock Foster is going to beat the brakes off of Ray Ford.
I don't think she's going to lose, but... Or we're taking Amanda on POINTS CUZ THE KNOCKOUT'S A BUCK 20.
it's either no bet or Juarez on the money line for me. I don't rate Yecasta Valle. I think she's going to get outworked.
